title: EPA v. DONNER-HANNA COKE CO
text:
EPA Enforcement Case 02-1977-0007: DONNER-HANNA COKE CO
Type: Civil Judicial Action
Status: Closed
Outcome: Dismissed By Tribunal
Lead Agency: EPA

Laws and Sections Violated:
  CAA: 110: Implementation Plan for National Primary and Secondary Ambient Air Quality Standards (State Implementation Plan for National Primary and Secondary Ambient Air Quality Standards)

Defendants:
  DONNER-HANNA COKE CO.

Facilities:
  DONNER HANNA COKE, ABBY & MYSTIC STS., BUFFALO, NY

Case Milestones:
  05/24/1977: Enforcement Action Data Entered
  05/24/1977: Referred To Dept Of Justice
  05/24/1977: Referred TO U.S. Attorney
  05/24/1977: Complaint Filed With Court
  02/12/1979: Concluded
  02/12/1979: Enforcement Action Closed

Pollutants:
  PM PARTICULATES

Violations:
Violation Of A SIP  Not Otherwise Specified
